g.text: Binary frame layout — planned wire protocol
The planned byte transport frames each message as one ArrayBuffer: a 16-byte header, then TLV sections.
Fixed 16-byte header — tsLow / tsHigh split Date.now() into two uint32 so the frame
carries no BigInt. The writer jumps straight to offset 16 for the payload.
data payload — one TLV section per subscribed feature (repeats: stats · batches · registry · env)
raw payload — per-feature header + typed-array bytes
stats section payload — scaled fixed-point, one sample per frame, keyed by startFrame
DATA 1 · SUBSCRIBE 2 · SUBSCRIBE_ACK 3 · ACK 4 · UNSUBSCRIBE 5 · PING 6
